name: Pre-existing back pain worsened by work fall—can I claim in Utah?
description: Yes, covers aggravation—get doc to link it.[2]

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back pain worsened by work fall—can I claim in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers aggravation—get doc to link it.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions.** Prove fall worsened it via doctor opinion.[2] Insurers deny often; medical records pre/post essential. No need full causation. Lawyer secures specialist testimony.
